song.title: I Don't Know
song.lyrics:
[v1] I don't know who I am I don't know who you are, I don't know your plan I can't read or even pray I can't do al lthe saints do, Can't say what they say.
[c1] But Lord You are real You are living in my spirit I know 'Cuz it's You I feel When I'm walking at night alone
[v2] Turbulence in my soul I don't quite fit into this world, It don't make me whole. But I still try to fit in While something in me struggles 'gainst this life of sin.
[c2] Lord, help me see Let me hear your voice within my life Let my vision be For the building up of your wife.
[v3] I don't know when it was But sometime there was Def'nitely a change in me. Now I see you in the saints And I see myself in them, too
[c3] My heart bursts for you I can't bear to see the lies fo this world Purify my heart through Let me stand after I rest in you 'Cuz I love you And you love me.
